issue_body_preview:
Overlaping experience to the present like the next example, causes a strange rendering that does not seem to be correct.
```md
[[experience]]
  title = "Software Engineer"
  company = ""
  company_url = ""
  location = ""
  date_start = "2011-08-01"
  date_end = "2014-07-01"
  description =
test_description_zh: 在 experience widget 中配置一个 location 为空字符串的经历条目，查看该条目在页面上的渲染效果，特别关注 location 区域是否有多余的分隔符、空白占位或布局错位。
expected_result_zh: 当 experience 条目的 location 字段为空或未设置时，页面应正常渲染该条目，不显示 location 相关的占位元素或分隔符，布局无重叠或异常间距。
